canonical_answer: A person wearing a black short-sleeved shirt holds a black handheld device with a white barcode label over a table. A silver metal block rests on top of a yellow rectangular sponge. A crumpled green cloth lies on the table surface to the left. A transparent glass containing yellow liquid stands in the background. The objects remain stationary while the device hovers above them.

canonical_answer: At 0s, a silver block rests on a yellow notepad beside a green cloth; at 4s, a person enters holding a black handheld device over the table; at 6s, the metal block is positioned on top of a yellow sponge; at 18s, the person moves the black device away from the camera.
